## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include error messages, screenshots, or logs.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.11.0]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 124]
- MMT-Pentester version: [e.g. 1.0.0]

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
